channel.title: One More Chapter
channel.description: A new love story, every day.

item.title: Cold Water
item.description: Roped into fake-dating her best friend's brother for a family lake weekend, she swears it's a favor — until a cold morning swim and one overheard sentence make pretending impossible.

item.title: The Off-Season
item.description: She drove four hours to sell her grandmother's seaside inn. The man keeping it standing was the first love she'd left behind.
